title: hud armor
description: Displays your armor durability, enchantment status, and equipped items directly on the HUD, giving you quick at-a-glance gear information without opening the inventory. Armor HUD
body:
HUD Armor enhances your gameplay by showing clear, configurable armor and equipment information directly on your screen. Instead of opening your inventory to check durability or see what you’re wearing, the mod displays everything in a clean and unobtrusive HUD element.

Features include:

* Real-time armor durability monitoring
* Display of enchantments and equipped items
* Customizable layout and position
* Minimal, performance-friendly design

Ideal for survival, PvP, and modded playthroughs where fast gear awareness matters.
